human-review.evidence: Delegated autonomous drive. Reviewed: 9-REQ composition spec (REQ-005 restated to the honest testable model + 2 revisions), F8-action-layer + F12-inject mounted in F9's pane, 7-lens review (18 findings — a blocker where my own v0.28.0 startup contract handshake contaminated the frozen e2e gatekeeper-log assertions across F10 + latently-broken F8) all resolved except 3 documented residuals, the CONV-046 fix also resolving F8's FINDING-022, TEST-624..648 + frozen e2e handshake amendments, CONV-047..053. Suite 1416 green. RESIDUAL/PREREQUISITE: FINDING-017 — the Playwright terminal-spawn e2e can't be witnessed green until node-pty's conpty.node is rebuilt (needs VS Spectre libs); resume-launch code is correct, env-only.

escalations.reason: 7-lens review: 1 blocker + MEDIUMs/LOWs. FINDING-016 (HIGH, tests-origin): the startup contract handshake (verifyOrkyContract, services.ts:62, my v0.28.0 addition) invokes 'gatekeeper contract' at boot, so the frozen e2e's gatekeeperLog===[] assertions (F10 TEST-632/635/636/637 AND co-owned F8 TEST-608/612 — F8's e2e was already latently broken) can't pass. Also 017 (.cmd resume-spawn maybe a real Windows defect), 018 (hidden-host detached outcome), 007/008/009 (tile layout: slot can't shrink, inject clipped, silent draft loss), LOWs 010/011/012/013/014/015. Human decision on the loopback.
escalations.decision: Loop back to tests (delegated). Fixes: FINDING-016 — amend the frozen e2e gatekeeperLog assertions (F10's + the co-owned F8 TEST-608/612, CONV-012/019) to assert NO gatekeeper invocation OTHER than the startup ['contract'] handshake (filter it out); the handshake is legitimate shipped behavior the tests must account for. FINDING-011 — pin the load-bearing armedMode===mode render guard (deleting it must fail a test, so FINDING-022 can't silently regress). FINDING-007 — the orky-pane-row-actions slot must be able to shrink (drop flex:none / allow wrap in the tile), tile-relative pin. FINDING-008 — the inject button must stay reachable in a narrow header (wrap/overflow, not clipped). FINDING-009 — the mode-flip disarm routes a draft-lost notice through the store toast chokepoint (CONV-034) + a focus fallback; amend TEST-630's toast-free ban accordingly. FINDING-017 — INVESTIGATE the .cmd resume spawn: if direct pty.spawn of claude.cmd genuinely fails on Windows, fix the launch (resolve .cmd via the shipped spawn path — this affects F8's REQ-014 too); if it's a test-stub artifact, document + pin the real path. FINDING-018 — the pane mount already has F9's hidden prop; gate the detached-outcome toast so a hidden-at-settle outcome still surfaces (reuse F9's host-hidden signal) — if not cheap, document as residual with 010/012/013/014/015. LOWs 010 (disarm resets binding), 012 (grep count now 18), 013 (resolvedAt), 015 (stale drawer read-only claims) — fold cheap ones into implement/doc-sync; 014 (NUL file) stays the standing backlog item.
